# HelloWorld server error handling test with aggressive timeouts

# Set ultra-aggressive timeouts for error scenarios
env MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT=1s  
env MCP_SERVER_TIMEOUT=800ms
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=600ms

# Start the server
exec timeout 6s go run . &
wait 100ms

# Test unknown language
cat > unknown_language.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 1,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "greeting",
    "arguments": {
      "name": "Test",
      "language": "klingon"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 1s echo "$(<unknown_language.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout "Unknown language 'klingon'"
stdout 'Available languages:'
stdout 'english'

# Test empty name (should default to World)
cat > empty_name.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 2,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "greeting",
    "arguments": {
      "name": "",
      "language": "english"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 1s echo "$(<empty_name.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'Hello, World!'

# Test unknown language with fortune
cat > unknown_language_fortune.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 3,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "greeting_with_fortune",
    "arguments": {
      "name": "Test",
      "language": "martian"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 1s echo "$(<unknown_language_fortune.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout "Unknown language 'martian'"
stdout 'Available languages:'

# Test invalid tool name (should be handled by framework)
cat > invalid_tool.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 4,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "nonexistent_tool",
    "arguments": {}
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 1s echo "$(<invalid_tool.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'tool not found|unknown tool|error'

# Test special characters in name
cat > special_chars.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 5,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "greeting",
    "arguments": {
      "name": "José María",
      "language": "spanish"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 1s echo "$(<special_chars.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'Hola, José María!'

# Cleanup
exec rm -f unknown_language.json empty_name.json unknown_language_fortune.json invalid_tool.json special_chars.json
